name: Roquefort Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 8 slice Firm white bread, crusts trimmed and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground meats, onion, bread crumbs, parsley, ketchup, mustard, 2 eggs, thyme, salt, and pepper.
2. Spread the mixture out on a large piece of waxed paper or parchment paper into a rectangle about 15 x 12".
3. Pour scalded cream over the bread in a medium size bowl and mix well. Add cheese and lightly beaten egg and beat with a fork until smooth.
4. Spread the cheese mixture over the meat mixture, leaving a 1-inch border on all sides.
5. Using the waxed paper as an aid and starting from one short side, roll up the meat like a jelly roll.
6. Peel back the paper as you roll. Place seam side down on a foil-lined baking sheet.
7. Bake for 1 hour at 375°F. Cut into thick slices and serve immediately.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
